# Character tag -> voice stem mapping
# Generated by 1.character.py
# Format: <character_tag>  <voice_stem>
# Voice stems are resolved by globbing voices/**/<stem>.wav
# Each stem must have a sibling <stem>.reference.txt

male_mysterious_scientist         bala_en
male_nobleman_mr_ashcroft         gaurav_en
